creator: phil@dip.host
text:
I am sorry, but I can not quickly produce the tests on production client's server. I have updated the firmware to the latest version for Dell PowerEdge 530. I have recompile the FreeBSD mrsas driver to the latest SVN revision. Problem still exists.


(CYPRUS === GENERIC with RACCT enabled and  mrsas from HEAD)
# uname -a
FreeBSD kf7.openstar.ru 10.1-RELEASE-p17 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p17 #3: Mon Aug 10 06:21:02 MSK 2015     root@**********:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CYPRUS  amd64

# sysctl dev.mrsas
dev.mrsas.%parent: 
dev.mrsas.0.%desc: AVAGO Invader SAS Controller
dev.mrsas.0.%driver: mrsas
dev.mrsas.0.%location: slot=0 function=0
dev.mrsas.0.%pnpinfo: vendor=0x1000 device=0x005d subvendor=0x1028 subdevice=0x1f49 class=0x010400
dev.mrsas.0.%parent: pci1
dev.mrsas.0.disable_ocr: 0
dev.mrsas.0.driver_version: 06.707.05.00-fbsd
dev.mrsas.0.reset_count: 0
dev.mrsas.0.fw_outstanding: 0
dev.mrsas.0.io_cmds_highwater: 81
dev.mrsas.0.mrsas_debug: 4
dev.mrsas.0.mrsas_io_timeout: 180000
dev.mrsas.0.mrsas_fw_fault_check_delay: 1
dev.mrsas.0.reset_in_progress: 0

(Last 2 lines - problem)
